title: ICSI Extends Deadline for 20 CPE Credits for FY 2025-26
content:
# ICSI Extends Deadline for 20 CPE Credits for FY 2025-26

Ek important update hai! The Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) ne financial year 2025-26 ke liye mandatory 20 CPE (Continuous Professional Education) credits complete karne ki deadline extend kar di hai.

The professional development of members is a key focus, aur is extension se members ko compliance poora karne ke liye additional time mil gaya hai.

*   **Old Due Date:** The original deadline to complete 20 CPE credits for FY 2025-26 was March 31, 2026.
*   **New Due Date:** Members can now complete their 20 CPE credits for the year 2025-26 up to **June 30, 2026**.
*   **Applicable Financial Year:** This extension specifically applies to the Continuous Professional Education requirements for the financial year 2025-26.

This is a welcome relief for all members to ensure they meet their compliance obligations.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icsi.edu/whats-new-icsi/)

*Published on: 17 June 2026*
